---
name: RFC proposal
about: A new subsystem, protocol change, or breaking SDK/format change
title: "[rfc] "
labels: rfc
---

Per [docs/rfcs/README.md](../../docs/rfcs/README.md), this class of change needs a
written RFC before implementation. Use this issue to propose the idea and get early
feedback before writing the full RFC; once there's rough agreement, open a PR adding
`docs/rfcs/RFC-NNNN-<slug>.md` using the template in that README, status `Draft`.
